caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap and a black hoodie with gold text that reads "BOSS TALK" is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a black microphone and wears black headphones. On the table in front of him is a black mug with gold text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". To his left is a white backdrop featuring the logo "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeated vertically alongside yellow stars. In the background, a sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and speaks, shifting his facial expressions and slightly adjusting his head and hand movements. His right hand, adorned with a gold ring, rests on the table and moves slightly as he talks. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the man and the surrounding recording equipment.
